Package org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator

Class Translator

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.IdentityTranslatorBase
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.IdentityTranslator
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.Translator
public class Translator extends IdentityTranslator
Implements the predicate reduction rules: BR1-BR8, ER1-ER13, CR1-CR7
